title: Many Morigins
description: A jumbled collection of any random origins I feel like adding. Balancing and complexity may vary.
body:
## Description:
(Eventually) A hellish amalgamation of whatever strange horrors I come up with in my brain (read: Origins addon of silly goofy stuff :3)
## Currently Includes:
- Forg (jumpy little guy)
- Packrat (loot goblin)
- Weaver (eldritch spider horror)
## In The Works:
- Nothing
## Maybe One Day:
- More origins
- Something really cool and awesome
- Lorigins Void King but cooler? (read: less balanced)
- Some dragon-based thingy
- More origins
- More animal-based stuff (bird, fish)
## The Flavour Text (dw about it):
Question nothing.

It will improve. Eventually.

UwU

[3] origins so far
